column1: Luis Arraez stands out as a rock-solid pick at home, riding a steady track record with hits in over 77% of games and a favorable lefty matchup against Aaron Civale. Bobby Witt Jr. offers similar reliability, boasting the highest recent hit rate in the group and a slight park boost. Jackson Chourio and Jake McCarthy both carry platoon advantages but come with less consistency, while Brandon Marsh is less dependable despite a good lineup spot.
